name: Alakazam
description: Its brain can outperform a supercomputer. Its intelligence quotient is said to be 5000.

abilities.name: Damage Swap
abilities.effect: As often as you like during your turn (before your attack), you may move 1 damage counter from 1 of your Pokémon to another as long as you don't Knock Out that Pokémon. This power can't be used if Alakazam is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Confuse Ray
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, defender is now Confused.

name: Articuno
description: A legendary bird Pokémon that is said to appear to doomed people who are lost in icy mountains.

attacks.name: Freeze Dry
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Blizzard
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. If tails, this attack does 10 damage to each of your own Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Charizard
description: Spits fire that is hot enough to melt boulders. Known to unintentionally cause forest fires.

abilities.name: Energy Burn
abilities.effect: As often as you like during your turn (before your attack), you may turn all Energy attached to Charizard into R for the rest of the turn. This power can't be used if Charizard is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Fire Spin
attacks.effect: Discard 2 Energy cards attached to Charizard in order to use this attack.

name: Dark Blastoise
description: An aggressive Pokémon that tackles anything it sees.

attacks.name: Hydrocannon
attacks.effect: Does 30 damage plus 20 more damage for each W Energy attached to Dark Blastoise but not used to pay for this attack. You can't add more than 40 damage in this way.

attacks.name: Rocket Tackle
attacks.effect: Dark Blastoise does 10 damage to itself. Flip a coin. If heads, prevent all damage done to Dark Blastoise during your opponent's next turn. (Any other effects of attacks still happen.)

name: Dark Dragonite
description: Sometimes called "The God of Destruction." Its wings are able to support it in spite of its massive weight.

abilities.name: Summon Minions
abilities.effect: When you play Dark Dragonite from your hand, search your deck for up to 2 Basic Pokémon and put them onto your Bench. Shuffle your deck afterward.

attacks.name: Giant Tail
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

name: Dark Persian
description: Popular with women because of its beautiful fur. The leader of the Rockets keeps one as a pet.

attacks.name: Fascinate
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, choose 1 of your opponent's Benched Pokémon and switch it with the Defending Pokémon. This attack can't be used if your opponent has no Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Poison Claws
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

name: Dark Raichu
description: Stores up electricity in its body, then suddenly releases it to surprise and shock everyone.

attacks.name: Surprise Thunder
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, flip another coin. If the second coin is heads, this attack does 20 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. If the second coin is tails, this attack does 10 damage to each of your opponent's Benched Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon

name: Dark Slowbro
description: It loves nothing better than to be left alone, and so sometimes ends up being manipulated by unscrupulous people.

abilities.name: Reel In
abilities.effect: When you play Dark Slowbro from your hand, choose up to 3 Basic Pokémon and/or Evolution cards from your discard pile and put them into your hand.

attacks.name: Fickle Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

name: Dark Vaporeon
description: A Pokémon capable of controlling water, so it is capable of creating giant whirlpools.

attacks.name: Whirlpool
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon has any Energy cards attached to it, choose 1 of them and discard it.

name: Flareon
description: When storing thermal energy in its body, its temperature could soar to over 1600 degrees.

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 20 more damage; if tails, this attack does 10 damage.

attacks.name: Flamethrower
attacks.effect: Discard 1 Energy card attached to Flareon in order to use this attack.

name: Gengar
description: Under a full moon, this Pokémon like to mimic the shadows of people and laugh at their fright.

abilities.name: Curse
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may move 1 damage counter from 1 of your opponent's Pokémon to another (even if it would Knock Out the other Pokémon). This power can't be used if Gengar is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Dark Mind
attacks.effect: If your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, choose 1 of them and this attack does 10 damage to it. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Gyarados
description: Rarely seen in the wild. Huge and vicious, it is capable of destroying entire cities in a rage.

attacks.name: Bubblebeam
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Hitmonlee
description: When in a hurry, its legs lengthen progressively. It runs smoothly with extra long, loping strides.

attacks.name: Stretch Kick
attacks.effect: If your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, choose 1 of them and this attack does 20 damage to it. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Jolteon
description: It accumulates negative ions from the atmosphere to blast out 10,000-volt lightning bolts.

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 20 more damage; if tails, this attack does 10 damage.

attacks.name: Pin Missile
attacks.effect: Flip 4 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

name: Machamp
description: Using its amazing muscles, it throws powerful punches that can knock its victim clear over the horizon.

abilities.name: Strikes Back
abilities.effect: Whenever your opponent's attack damages Machamp (even if Machamp is Knoced Out), this power does 10 damage to attacking Pokémon. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance.) This power can't be used if Machamp is already Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed when your opponent attacks.

name: Muk
description: Thickly covered with a filthy, vile sludge. It is so toxic, even its footprints contain poison.

abilities.name: Toxic Gas
abilities.effect: Ignore all Pokémon Powers other than Toxic Gases. This power stops working while Muk is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Sludge
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

name: Ninetales
description: Very smart and very vengeful. Grabbing one of its many tails could result in a 1,000-year curse.

attacks.name: Lure
attacks.effect: If your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, choose 1 of them and switch it with the Defending Pokémon.

attacks.name: Fire Blast
attacks.effect: Discard 1 Energy card attached to Ninetales in order to use this attack.

name: Venusaur
description: This plant blooms when it is absorbing solar energy. It stays on the move to seek sunlight.

abilities.name: Energy Trans
abilities.effect: As often as you like during your turn (before your attack), you may take 1 Grass Energy card attached to 1 of your Pokémon and attach it to a different one. This power can't be used if Venusaur is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

name: Zapdos
description: A legendary bird Pokémon said to appear from clouds while wielding enormous lightning bolts.

attacks.name: Thunder
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, Zapdos does 30 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Thunderbolt
attacks.effect: Discard all Energy cards attached to Zapdos in order to use this attack.

name: Beedrill
description: Flies at high speed and attacks using the large, venomous stingers on its forelegs and tail.

attacks.name: Twineedle
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Poison Sting
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

name: Butterfree
description: In battle, it flaps its wings at high speed to release highly toxic dust into the air.

attacks.name: Whirlwind
attacks.effect: If your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, he or she chooses 1 of them and switches it with the Defending Pokémon. (Do the damage before switching the Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Mega Drain
attacks.effect: Remove a number of damage counters from Butterfree equal to half the damage done to the Defending Pokémon (after applying Weakness and Resistance) (rounded up to the nearest 10).

name: Electrode
description: It stores electrical energy under very high pressure. It often explodes with little or no provocation.

attacks.name: Chain Lightning
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon isn't Colorless, this attack does 10 damage to each Benched Pokémon of the same type as the Defending Pokémon (including your own).

name: Exeggutor
description: Legend has it that on rare occasions, one of its heads will drop off and continue on as an Exeggcute.

attacks.name: Teleport
attacks.effect: Switch Exeggutor with 1 of your Benched Pokémon.

attacks.name: Big Eggsplosion
attacks.effect: Flip a number of coins equal to the number of Energy attached to Exeggutor. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

name: Golem
description: Its boulder-like body is extremely hard. It can easily withstand dynamite blasts without damage.

attacks.name: Selfdestruct
attacks.effect: Does 20 damage to each Pokémon on each player's Bench. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.) Golem does 100 damage to itself.

name: Hypno
description: When it locks eyes with an enemy, it will use a mix of psi moves such as Hypnosis and Confusion.

attacks.name: Prophecy
attacks.effect: Look at up to 3 cards from the top of either player's deck and rearrange them as you like.

attacks.name: Dark Mind
attacks.effect: If your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, choose 1 of them and this attack does 10 damage to it. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Jynx
description: Merely by meditating, the Pokémon launches a powerful psychic energy attack.

attacks.name: Doubleslap
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Meditate
attacks.effect: Does 20 damage plus 10 more damage for each damage counter on the Defending Pokémon.

name: Kabutops
description: Its sleek shape is perfect for swimming. It slashes prey with its claws and drains the body fluids.

attacks.name: Absorb
attacks.effect: Remove a number of damage counters from Kabutops equal to half the damage done to Defending Pokémon (after applying Weakness and Resistance) (rounded up to the nearest 10). If Kabutops has fewer damage counters than that, remove all of them.

name: Magneton
description: Formed by several Magnemites linked together. They frequently appear when sunspots flare up.

attacks.name: Sonicboom
attacks.effect: Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for this attack. (Any other effects that would happen after applying Weakness and Resistance still happen.)

attacks.name: Selfdestruct
attacks.effect: Does 20 damage to each Pokémon on each player's Bench. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.) Magneton does 100 damage to itself.

name: Mewtwo
description: A scientist created this Pokémon after years of horrific gene-splicing and DNA engineering experiments.

attacks.name: Energy Control
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, choose a basic Energy card attached to 1 of your opponent's Pokémon and attach it to another of your opponent's Pokémon of your choice.

attacks.name: Telekinesis
attacks.effect: Choose 1 of your opponent's Pokémon. This attack does 30 damage to that Pokémon. Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for this attack. (Any other effects that would happen after applying Weakness and Resistance still happen.)

name: Moltres
description: Known as the legendary bird of fire. Every flap of its wings creates a dazzling flash of flames.

attacks.name: Wildfire
attacks.effect: You may discard any number of R Energy cards attached to Moltres when you use this attack. If you do, discard that many cards from the top of your opponent's deck.

attacks.name: Dive Bomb
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

name: Nidoking
description: Uses its powerful tail in battle to smash, constrict, then break its prey's bones.

attacks.name: Thrash
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 30 damage plus 10 more damage; if tails, this attack does 30 damage and Nidoking does 10 damage to itself.

attacks.name: Toxic
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned. It now takes 20 Poison damage instead of 10 after each player's turn (even if it was already Poisoned).

name: Nidoqueen
description: Its hard scales provide strong protection. It uses its hefty bulk to execute powerful moves.

attacks.name: Boyfriends
attacks.effect: Does 20 damage plus 20 more damage for each Nidoking you have in play.

name: Pidgeot
description: When hunting, it skims the surface of water at high speed to pick off unwary prey such as Magikarp.

attacks.name: Hurricane
attacks.effect: Unless this attack Knocks Out the Defending Pokémon, return the Defending Pokémon and all cards attached to it to your opponent's hand.

name: Pidgeotto
description: Very protective of its sprawling territory, this Pokémon will fiercely peck at any intruder.

attacks.name: Whirlwind
attacks.effect: If your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, he or she chooses 1 of them and switches it with the Defending Pokémon. (Do the damage before switching the Pokémon.)

attacks.name: Mirror Move
attacks.effect: If Pidgeotto was attacked last turn, do the final result of that attack on Pidgeotto to the Defending Pokémon.

name: Rhydon
description: Protected by an armor-like hide, it is capable of living in molten lava of 3600 degrees.

attacks.name: Ram
attacks.effect: Rhydon does 20 damage to itself. If your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, he or she chooses 1 of them and switches it with the Defending Pokémon. (Do the damage before switching the Pokémon. Switch the Pokémon even if Rhydon is knocked out.)

name: Arcanine
description: A Pokémon that has been long admired for its beauty. It runs gracefully, as if on wings.

attacks.name: Flamethrower
attacks.effect: Discard 1 Energy card attached to Arcanine in order to use this attack.

attacks.name: Take Down
attacks.effect: Arcanine does 30 damage to itself.

name: Charmeleon
description: When it swings its burning tail, it raises the temperature to unbearably high levels.

attacks.name: Flamethrower
attacks.effect: Discard 1 Energy card attached to Charmeleon in order to use this attack.

name: Dark Dragonair
description: As is fitting for a legendary Pokémon, it has many strange powers, including the ability to make rain or snow fall.

abilities.name: Evolutionary Light
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack), you may search your deck for an Evolution card. Show it to your opponent and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward. This power can't be used if Dark Dragonair is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Tail Strike
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 damage plus 20 more damage; if tails, this attack does 20 damage.

name: Dark Wartortle
description: A Pokémon with a negative attitude, it hides in its shell whenever it's in a bad mood—which is often.

attacks.name: Doubleslap
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Mirror Shell
attacks.effect: If an attack does damage to Dark Wartortle during your opponent's next turn (even if Dark Wartortle is Knocked Out), Dark Wartortle attacks the Defending Pokémon for an equal amount of damage.

name: Dewgong
description: Stores thermal energy in its body. Swims at a steady 8 knots even in intensely cold waters.

attacks.name: Ice Beam
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Dodrio
description: Uses its three brains to execute complex plans. While two heads sleep, one head stays awake.

abilities.name: Retreat Aid
abilities.effect: As long as Dodrio is Benched, pay 1 Colorless less to retreat your Active Pokémon.

attacks.name: Rage
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage plus 10 more damage for each damage counter on Dodrio.

name: Fearow
description: With its huge and magnificent wings, it can keep aloft without ever having to land for rest.

attacks.name: Agility
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to Fearow.

name: Golduck
description: Often seen swimming elegantly by lake shores. It is often mistaken for the Japanese monster, Kappa.

attacks.name: Psyshock
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Hyper Beam
attacks.effect: If the Defending Pokémon has any Energy cards attached to it, choose 1 of them and discard it.

name: Graveler
description: Rolls down slopes to move. It rolls over any obstacle without slowing or changing its direction.

attacks.name: Harden
attacks.effect: During your opponent's next turn, whenever 30 or less damage is done to Graveler (after applying Weakness and Resistance), prevent that damage. (Any other effects of attacks still happen.)

name: Growlithe
description: Very protective of its territory. It will bark and bite to repel intruders from its space.

name: Haunter
description: Because of its ability to slip through block walls, it is said to be from another dimension.

abilities.name: Transparency
abilities.effect: Whenever an attack does anything to Haunter, flip a coin. If heads, prevent all effects of that attack, including damage, done to Haunter. This power stops working while Haunter is Asleep.

attacks.name: Nightmare
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

name: Ivysaur
description: When the bulb on its back grows large, the Pokémon seems to lose the ability to stand on its hind legs.

attacks.name: Poisonpowder
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

name: Kabuto
description: A Pokémon that was resurrected from a fossil found in what was once the ocean floor eons ago.

abilities.name: Kabuto Armor
abilities.effect: Whenever an attack (even your own) does damage to Kabuto (after applying Weakness and Resistance), that attack only does half the damage to Kabuto (rounded down to nearest 10). (Any other effects of attacks still happen.) This power stops working while Kabuto is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

name: Kadabra
description: It emits special alpha waves from its body that induce headaches even to those just nearby.

attacks.name: Recover
attacks.effect: Discard 1 Energy card attached to Kadabra in order use this attack. Remove all damage counters from Kadabra.

name: Kakuna
description: Almost incapable of moving, this Pokémon can only harden its shell to protect itself from predators.

attacks.name: Stiffen
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, prevent all damage done to Kakuna during your opponent's next turn. (Any other effects of attacks still happen.)

attacks.name: Poisonpowder
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

name: Machoke
description: Its muscular body is so powerful that it must wear a power-save belt to help regulate its motions.

attacks.name: Karate Chop
attacks.effect: Does 50 damage minus 10 for each damage counter on Machoke.

attacks.name: Submission
attacks.effect: Machoke does 20 damage to itself.

name: Magikarp
description: In the distant past, it was stronger than its horribly weak descendants that exist today.

attacks.name: Flail
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage times number of damage counters on Magikarp.

name: Meowth
description: Adores circular objects. Wanders the streets on a nightly basis to look for dropped loose change.

attacks.name: Pay Day
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, draw a card.

name: Metapod
description: It is vulnerable to attack because its shell is soft, exposing its weak and tender body.

attacks.name: Stiffen
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, prevent all damage done to Metapod during your opponent's next turn. (Any other effects of attacks still happen.)

attacks.name: Stun Spore
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Nidorina
description: The female's horn develops slowly. Prefers physical attacks such as clawing and biting.

attacks.name: Supersonic
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Double Kick
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

name: Nidorino
description: An aggressive Pokémon that is quick to attack. The horn on its head secretes a powerful venom.

attacks.name: Double Kick
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

name: Omanyte
description: Although long extinct, in rare cases, it can be genetically resurrected from fossils.

abilities.name: Clairvoyance
abilities.effect: Your opponent plays with his or her hand face up. This power stops working while Omanyte is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Water Gun
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage plus 10 more damage for each Energy attached to Omanyte but not used to pay for this attack's Energy cost. You can't add more than 20 damage in this way.

name: Omastar
description: A prehistoric Pokémon that died out when its heavy shell made it impossible for it to catch prey.

attacks.name: Water Gun
attacks.effect: Does 20 damage plus 10 more damage for each Energy attached to Omastar but not used to pay for this attack's Energy cost. You can't add more than 20 damage in this way.

attacks.name: Spike Cannon
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 30 damage times the number of heads.

name: Primeape
description: Always furious and tenacious to boot. It will not abandon chasing its quarry until its quarry is caught.

attacks.name: Fury Swipes
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Tantrum
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, Primeape is now Confused (after doing damage).

name: Rapidash
description: Very competitive, this Pokémon will chase anything that moves fast in the hope of racing it.

attacks.name: Stomp
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 damage plus 10 more damage; if tails, this attack does 20 damage.

attacks.name: Agility
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to Rapidash.

name: Raticate
description: It uses its whiskers to maintain its balance. It seems to slow down if they are cut off.

attacks.name: Super Fang
attacks.effect: Does damage to the Defending Pokémon equal to half the Defending Pokémon's remaining HP (rounded up to the nearest 10).

name: Sandslash
description: Curls up into a spiny ball when threatened. It can roll while curled up to attack or escape.

attacks.name: Fury Swipes
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 20 damage times the number of heads.

name: Seadra
description: Capable of swimming backward by rapidly flapping its wing-like pectoral fins and stout tail.

attacks.name: Water Gun
attacks.effect: Does 20 damage plus 10 more damage for each Energy attached to Seadra but not used to pay for this attack's Energy cost. You can't add more than 20 damage in this way.

attacks.name: Agility
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, during your opponent's next turn, prevent all effects of attacks, including damage, done to Seadra.

name: Snorlax
description: Very lazy. Just eats and sleeps. As its rotund bulk builds, it becomes steadily more slothful.

abilities.name: Thick Skinned
abilities.effect: Snorlax can't become Asleep, Confused, Paralyzed, or Poisoned. This power can't be used if Snorlax is already Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Body Slam
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Tauros
description: When it targets an enemy, it charges furiously while whipping its body with its long tails.

attacks.name: Stomp
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 damage plus 10 more damage; if tails, this attack does 20 damage.

attacks.name: Rampage
attacks.effect: Does 20 damage plus 10 more damage for each damage counter on Tauros. Flip a coin. If tails, Tauros is now Confused (after doing damage).

name: Tentacruel
description: The tentacles are normally kept short. On hunts, the are extended to ensnare and immobilize prey.

attacks.name: Supersonic
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

attacks.name: Jellyfish Sting
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

name: Abra
description: Using its ability to read minds, it will identify impending danger and teleport to safety.

attacks.name: Psyshock
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Bulbasaur
description: A strange seed was planted on its back at birth. Thus, a plant sprouted and now grows with this Pokémon.

attacks.name: Leech Seed
attacks.effect: Unless all damage from this attack is prevented, you may remove 1 damage counter from Bulbasaur.

name: Caterpie
description: Its short feet are tipped with suction pads that enable it to tirelessly climb slopes and walls.

attacks.name: String Shot
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

name: Charmander
description: Obviously prefers hot places. If it gets caught in the rain, steam is said to spout from the tip of its tail.

attacks.name: Ember
attacks.effect: Discard 1 Energy card attached to Charmander in order to use this attack.

name: Doduo
description: A bird that makes up for its poor flying with its fast foot speed. Leaves giant footprints.

attacks.name: Fury Attack
attacks.effect: Flip 2 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

name: Dratini
description: Long considered a mythical Pokémon until recently, when a small colony was found living underwater.

name: Drowzee
description: Not popular with girls because of its attitude. Can often be heard muttering to itself in a low voice.

abilities.name: Long Distance Hypnosis
abilities.effect: Once during your turn (before your attack) you may flip a coin. If heads defender is now Asleep; if tails, your active Pokémon is now Asleep. The power can't be used if Drowzee is affected by a Special Condition.

attacks.name: Nightmare
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

name: Eevee
description: Its genetic code is irregular. It may mutate if it is exposed to radiation from elemental stones.

attacks.name: Tail Wag
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon can't attack Eevee during your opponent's next turn. (Benching either Pokémon ends this effect.)

attacks.name: Quick Attack
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 10 damage plus 20 more damage; if tails, this attack does 10 damage.

name: Exeggcute
description: Often mistaken for eggs. When disturbed, they quickly gather and attack in swarms.

attacks.name: Hypnosis
attacks.effect: The Defending Pokémon is now Asleep.

attacks.name: Leech Seed
attacks.effect: Unless all damage from this attack is prevented, you may remove 1 damage counter from Exeggcute.

name: Gastly
description: A mysterious Pokémon. Some say it is a lifeform from another dimension, while others believe it is formed from smog.

attacks.name: Lick
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Energy Conversion
attacks.effect: Put up to 2 Energy cards from your discard pile into your hand. Gastly does 10 damage to itself.

name: Geodude
description: Found in fields and mountains. Mistaking them for boulders, people often step or trip on them.

attacks.name: Stone Barrage
attacks.effect: Flip a coin until you get tails. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

name: Grimer
description: Appears in filthy areas. Thrives by sucking up polluted sludge that is pumped out of factories.

attacks.name: Nasty Goo
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Minimize
attacks.effect: All damage done by attacks to Grimer during your opponent's next turn is reduced by 20 (after applying Weakness and Resistance).

name: Machop
description: It's said that not even pro wrestlers can take down a Machop.

name: Magnemite
description: Uses anti-gravity to stay suspended. Appears without warning and uses attacks like Thunder Wave.

attacks.name: Thunder Wave
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Selfdestruct
attacks.effect: Does 10 damage to each Pokémon on each player's Bench. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.) Magnemite does 40 damage to itself.

name: Mankey
description: Normally friendly, it quickly becomes angry if it doesn't get what it wants.

attacks.name: Mischief
attacks.effect: Shuffle your opponent's deck.

attacks.name: Anger
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, this attack does 20 damage plus 20 more; if tails, this attack does 20 damage.

name: Nidoran♀
description: Although small, its venomous barbs make this Pokémon dangerous. The female has smaller horns.

attacks.name: Fury Swipes
attacks.effect: Flip 3 coins. This attack does 10 damage times the number of heads.

attacks.name: Call for Family
attacks.effect: Search your deck for a Basic Pokémon named Nidoran M or Nidoran F and put it onto your Bench. Shuffle your deck afterward. (You can't use this attack if your Bench is full.)

name: Nidoran♂
description: Stiffens its ears to sense danger. The larger, more powerful of its horns secretes venom.

attacks.name: Horn Hazard
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If tails, this attack does nothing.

name: Onix
description: As it grows, the stone portions of its body harden to become similar to a diamond, though colored black.

attacks.name: Harden
attacks.effect: During opponent's next turn, whenever 30 or less damage is done to Onix (after applying Weakness and Resistance), prevent that damage. (Any other effects of attacks still happen.)

name: Pidgey
description: A common sight in forests and woods. It flaps its wings at ground level to kick up blinding sand.

attacks.name: Whirlwind
attacks.effect: After damage dealing, opponent chooses 1 Benched Pokémon and switches it with defending Pokémon (only if opponent has Benched Pokémon).

name: Pikachu
description: When several of these Pokémon gather, their electricity can build and cause lightning storms.

attacks.name: Spark
attacks.effect: If your opponent has any Benched Pokémon, choose 1 of them and this attack does 10 damage to it. (Don't apply Weakness and Resistance for Benched Pokémon.)

name: Ponyta
description: Its hooves are 10 times harder than diamonds. It can trample anything flat in moments.

name: Psyduck
description: It is often seen holding its head in its paws, as if it were suffering from a headache.

attacks.name: Dizziness
attacks.effect: Draw a card.

attacks.name: Water Gun
attacks.effect: Does 20 damage plus 10 more damage for each Energy attached to Psyduck but not used to pay for this attack. You can't add more than 20 damage in this way.

name: Rattata
description: Bites anything when it attacks. Small and very quick, it is a common sight in many places.

name: Rhyhorn
description: Its massive bones are 1,000 times harder than human bones. It can easily knock a trailer flying.

attacks.name: Leer
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon can't attack Rhyhorn during your opponent's next turn. (Benching either Pokémon ends this effect.)

name: Sandshrew
description: Burrow deep underground in arid locations far from water. It only emerges to hunt for food.

attacks.name: Sand
attacks.effect: If defender tries to attack during opponent's next turn, your opponent flips a coin. If tails, that attack does nothing.

name: Seel
description: The protruding horn on its head is very hard. This horn is used for bashing through thick ice.

name: Slowpoke
description: Incredibly slow and dopey. It takes 5 seconds for it to feel pain when under attack.

attacks.name: Spacing Out
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, remove a damage counter from Slowpoke. This attack can't be used if Slowpoke has no damage counters on it.

attacks.name: Scavenge
attacks.effect: Discard 1 Energy card attached to Slowpoke in order to use this attack. Put a Trainer card from your discard pile into your hand.

name: Spearow
description: Eats bugs in grassy areas. It has to flap its short wings at high speed to stay airborne.

attacks.name: Mirror Move
attacks.effect: If Spearow was attacked last turn, do the final result of that attack on Spearow to the Defending Pokémon.

name: Squirtle
description: After birth, its back swells and hardens into a shell. It powerfully sprays foam from its mouth.

attacks.name: Bubble
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Paralyzed.

attacks.name: Withdraw
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, prevent all damage done to Squirtle during your opponent's next turn. (Any other effects of attacks still happen.)

name: Tentacool
description: Drifts in shallow seas. Anglers who hook them by accident are often punished by its stinging acid.

abilities.name: Cowardice
abilities.effect: At any time during your turn (before your attack), you may return Tentacool to your hand. (Discard all cards attached to Tentacool.) This power can't be used the turn you put Tentacool into play or if Tentacool is Asleep, Confused, or Paralyzed.

name: Voltorb
description: Usually found in power plants. Easily mistaken for a Poké Ball, it has zapped many people.

name: Vulpix
description: At the time of birth, it has just one tail. Its tail splits from the tip as it grows older.

attacks.name: Confuse Ray
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, the Defending Pokémon is now Confused.

name: Weedle
description: Often found in forests, eating leaves. It has a sharp, venomous stinger on its head.

attacks.name: Poison Sting
attacks.effect: Flip a coin. If heads, Defending Pokémon is now Poisoned.

name: Full Heal Energy
effect: If you play this card from your hand, the Pokémon you attach it to is no longer affected by a Special Condition. Full Heal Energy provides Colorless energy. (Doesn't count as a basic Energy card.)

name: Potion Energy
effect: If you play this card from your hand, remove 1 damage counter from the Pokémon you attach it to, if it has any. Potion Energy provides Colorless energy. (Doesn't count as a basic Energy card.)

name: Pokémon Breeder
effect: Put a Stage 2 Evolution card from your hand on the matching Basic Pokémon. You can play this card only when you would be allowed to evolve that Pokémon anyway.

name: Pokémon Trader
effect: Trade 1 of the Basic Pokémon or Evolution cards in your hand for 1 of the Basic Pokémon or Evolution cards from your deck. Show both cards to your opponent. Shuffle your deck afterward.

name: Scoop Up
effect: Choose 1 of your Pokémon in play and return its Basic Pokémon card to your hand. (Discard all cards attached to that card.)

name: The Boss's Way
effect: Search your deck for an Evolution card with Dark in its name. Show it to your opponent and put it into your hand. Shuffle your deck afterward.

name: Challenge!
effect: Ask your opponent if he or she accepts your challenge. If your opponent declines (or if both Benches are full), draw 2 cards. If your opponent accepts, each of you searches your decks for any number of Basic Pokémon cards and puts them face down onto your Benches. (A player can't do this if his or her Bench is full.) When you both have finished, shuffle your decks and turn those cards face up.

name: Energy Retrieval
effect: Trade 1 of the other cards in your hand for up to 2 basic Energy cards from your discard pile.

name: Mysterious Fossil
effect: Play Mysterious Fossil as if it were a Basic Pokémon. While in play, Mysterious Fossil counts as a Pokémon (instead of a Trainer card). Mysterious Fossil has no attacks, can't retreat, and can't be affected by Special Conditions. If Mysterious Fossil is Knocked Out, it doesn't count as a Knocked Out Pokémon. (Discard it anyway.) At any time during your turn before your attack, you may discard Mysterious Fossil from play. You can put Pokémon that evolve from Mysterious Fossil on this card.

name: Potion
effect: Remove up to 2 damage counters from 1 of your Pokémon.
